title: Chaining Refreshable Materialized Views and Materialized Views doesn't provide a result
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
When I chain a refreshable materialized views and an incremental materialized views, the last table doesn't receive any data.
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
I'm using ClickHouse 25.1.8.25
### How to reproduce
This is a small example from a much more complex use case:
- Table `initial` will receive data from user
- Table `target1` will receive data from `initial` through a refreshable materialized view `initial_target1_mv`
- Table `target2` will receive data from `target1` through an incremental materialized view `target1_target2_mv`
```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.initial
(
n          UInt32,
_timestamp DateTime DEFAULT now()
)
ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(_timestamp)
ORDER BY (n);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.target1
(
x          UInt32,
_timestamp DateTime DEFAULT now()
)
ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(_timestamp)
ORDER BY (x);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.target2
(
x          UInt32,
_timestamp DateTime DEFAULT now()
)
ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree(_timestamp)
ORDER BY (x);
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS default.initial_target1_mv
-- @formatter:off
REFRESH EVERY 1 MINUTE TO default.target1 AS
-- @formatter:on
SELECT n AS x
FROM default.initial
WHERE randCanonical() < 0.5;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS default.target1_target2_mv
TO default.target2 AS
SELECT x
FROM default.target1;
INSERT INTO default.initial(n)
SELECT  number AS n
FROM numbers(11);
SELECT *
FROM default.initial;
SELECT *
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.initial_complex (n UInt32, description VARCHAR(255), _timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ENGINE = REPLACE INTO default.initial_complex (_timestamp) ORDER BY (n);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.target1_complex (x UInt32, status VARCHAR(255), _timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ENGINE = REPLACE INTO default.target1_complex (_timestamp) ORDER BY (x);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS default.target2_complex (x UInt32, value FLOAT, _timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ENGINE = REPLACE INTO default.target2_complex (_timestamp) ORDER BY (x);

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS default.initial_target1_mv_complex AS SELECT n AS x, CASE WHEN n % 2 = 0 THEN 'even' ELSE 'odd' END AS status FROM default.initial_complex WHERE MOD(FLOOR(RAND() * 100), 2) = 0;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS default.target1_target2_mv_complex AS SELECT x, CAST(x AS FLOAT) * 1.5 AS value FROM default.target1_complex WHERE status IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Chaining refreshable and incremental materialized views fails
